This plant is known for its various health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and congestion. In traditional herbal medicine, Lycopodium clavatum is commonly prepared as a tincture or a powder, and is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
